initial_program:
% Output grid is 3x3
row(0).
row(1).
row(2).
col(0).
col(1).
col(2).
output_cell(R_out,C_out) :- row(R_out), col(C_out).

% Exactly one colour for each output cell
1 { output(R_out,C_out,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R_out,C_out).

% Position (order) of each nonzero input cell in columnmajor order
posCount1(R_out,C_out,V_out,P1) :- input(R_out,C_out,V_out), V_out != 0,
    P1 = #count{ R2,C2,V2 : input(R2,C2,V2), V2 != 0, C2 < C_out }.
posCount2(R_out,C_out,V_out,P2) :- input(R_out,C_out,V_out), V_out != 0,
    P2 = #count{ R2 : input(R2,C_out,V2), V2 != 0, R2 < R_out }.
pos(R_out,C_out,V_out,Pos) :- posCount1(R_out,C_out,V_out,P1),
                           posCount2(R_out,C_out,V_out,P2),
                           Pos = P1 + P2.

% Map output cell to the input cell whose order matches its position
output(R_out,C_out,V_out) :-
    input(R_in,C_in,V_in),
    pos(R_in,C_in,V_in,Pos),
    (R_out * 3) + C_out = Pos.

% Existence predicate (same as output)
exists(R_out,C_out,V) :- output(R_out,C_out,V).

% Constraint: a nonzero output is allowed only when a matching input cell exists
:- not exists(R_out,C_out,V), V != 0.

#show output/3.

args.new_text:
% Constraint: a nonzero output is allowed only when a matching input cell exists.
:- exists(R_out,C_out,V), V != 0.
% Ensure variables are bounded before use
validR(R) :- R >= 0, R < 3.
validC(C) :- C >= 0, C < 3.
validV(V) :- V != 0, V >= 0, V < 3.

tool_calls.result: edit_lines: Lines 31-33 replaced. Program now has 38 lines.

tool_calls.name: edit_lines

args.new_text: output(R_out,C_out,V_out) :- validR(R_out), validC(C_out), validV(V_out), input(R_in,C_in,V_in), pos(R_in,C_in,V_in,Pos), (R_out * 3) + C_out = Pos.

tool_calls.result: edit_lines: Lines 23-26 replaced. Program now has 36 lines.

rounds.program_after:
% Output grid is 3x3
row(0).
row(1).
row(2).
col(0).
col(1).
col(2).
output_cell(R_out,C_out) :- row(R_out), col(C_out).

% Exactly one colour for each output cell
1 { output(R_out,C_out,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R_out,C_out).

% Position (order) of each nonzero input cell in columnmajor order
posCount1(R_out,C_out,V_out,P1) :- input(R_out,C_out,V_out), V_out != 0,
    P1 = #count{ R2,C2,V2 : input(R2,C2,V2), V2 != 0, C2 < C_out }.
posCount2(R_out,C_out,V_out,P2) :- input(R_out,C_out,V_out), V_out != 0,
    P2 = #count{ R2 : input(R2,C_out,V2), V2 != 0, R2 < R_out }.
pos(R_out,C_out,V_out,Pos) :- posCount1(R_out,C_out,V_out,P1),
                           posCount2(R_out,C_out,V_out,P2),
                           Pos = P1 + P2.

% Map output cell to the input cell whose order matches its position
output(R_out,C_out,V_out) :- validR(R_out), validC(C_out), validV(V_out), input(R_in,C_in,V_in), pos(R_in,C_in,V_in,Pos), (R_out * 3) + C_out = Pos.


% Existence predicate (same as output)
exists(R_out,C_out,V) :- output(R_out,C_out,V).

% Constraint: a nonzero output is allowed only when a matching input cell exists.
:- exists(R_out,C_out,V), V != 0.
% Ensure variables are bounded before use
validR(R) :- R >= 0, R < 3.
validC(C) :- C >= 0, C < 3.
validV(V) :- V != 0, V >= 0, V < 3.

#show output/3.

final_program:
% Output grid is 3x3
row(0).
row(1).
row(2).
col(0).
col(1).
col(2).
output_cell(R_out,C_out) :- row(R_out), col(C_out).

% Exactly one colour for each output cell
1 { output(R_out,C_out,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R_out,C_out).

% Position (order) of each nonzero input cell in columnmajor order
posCount1(R_out,C_out,V_out,P1) :- input(R_out,C_out,V_out), V_out != 0,
    P1 = #count{ R2,C2,V2 : input(R2,C2,V2), V2 != 0, C2 < C_out }.
posCount2(R_out,C_out,V_out,P2) :- input(R_out,C_out,V_out), V_out != 0,
    P2 = #count{ R2 : input(R2,C_out,V2), V2 != 0, R2 < R_out }.
pos(R_out,C_out,V_out,Pos) :- posCount1(R_out,C_out,V_out,P1),
                           posCount2(R_out,C_out,V_out,P2),
                           Pos = P1 + P2.

% Map output cell to the input cell whose order matches its position
output(R_out,C_out,V_out) :- validR(R_out), validC(C_out), validV(V_out), input(R_in,C_in,V_in), pos(R_in,C_in,V_in,Pos), (R_out * 3) + C_out = Pos.


% Existence predicate (same as output)
exists(R_out,C_out,V) :- output(R_out,C_out,V).

% Constraint: a nonzero output is allowed only when a matching input cell exists.
:- exists(R_out,C_out,V), V != 0.
% Ensure variables are bounded before use
validR(R) :- R >= 0, R < 3.
validC(C) :- C >= 0, C < 3.
validV(V) :- V != 0, V >= 0, V < 3.

#show output/3.
